items: Press ⌘F (Ctrl+F on Windows) to open a global search that looks across everything at once — agents, terminals, file and diff panels, scheduled sessions, and files on disk by name and content — and jump straight to any match.

You can now watch an individual agent to get a native desktop notification the moment it finishes a turn or needs your input. Turn it on per agent from its menu, or enable "Watch all agents" in Settings — both are off by default.

Each git folder in the sidebar now shows a compact ↑/↓ indicator of how far its branch is ahead of or behind its upstream, so you can spot unpushed commits or a needed pull without opening a terminal.
An agent's Fork, Copy resume command, and Watch actions are now tucked into a single "…" menu on its header, keeping the header uncluttered while every action stays one click away.
When editing a Kanban card, pressing Shift+Enter on a "-" bullet line now automatically starts the next bullet, and pressing it on an empty bullet ends the list.
Settings → Appearance now notes that Dark is the recommended theme.
Pressing Enter in the "New tab from template" dialog now advances and launches it, so you can go from template to open tab without reaching for the mouse.
